sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires cross-channel duplicate auto-confirmation to fail closed when calibration is absent but does not name the runtime boundary.
decisionTaken: Require calibratedForChannelMix=true for same_episode_confirmed auto-attach. Missing calibration records hard blocker cross_channel_calibration_missing and settles review_required.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The decision prevents reusing one channel's thresholds as universal proof.
operationalRisk: Over-conservative review increases staff work; under-conservative attach can silently merge unrelated requests.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Publish a new channel calibration reference before enabling auto-confirmation for new channel mixes.
